basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Ghorakhal – PGT, TGT, Nursing Assistant and More – 10 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Ghorakhal Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 10 vacancies across India. Candidates with B.Ed, B.Sc, MBBS, BPEd, M.Sc, PG Diploma Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through Sainik School Ghorakhal ssghorakhal.org.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: Within 21 days from the date of publication in Employment News

qualification.education_qualification: B.Ed, B.Sc, MBBS, BPEd, M.Sc, PG Diploma

selection_process: Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated separately
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit offline applications in the following manner:
